name: easy-query
desc: java/kotlin high performance lightweight solution for jdbc query,support oltp and olap query,一款java下面支持强类型、轻量级、高性能的ORM,致力于解决jdbc查询,拥有对象模型筛选、隐式子查询、隐式join
